title: Western Highland Cow Baby Shower Cookies
alt_text: A premium tray of custom sugar cookies decorated with lavender baby onesies with wings, green saguaro cacti, cowboy boots with flowers, and cute highland cow designs.
notes: Tray overview of the Western Highland Cow baby shower cookie set.

title: Highland Cow Custom Sugar Cookie
alt_text: An extreme close-up of a custom sugar cookie shaped like an arch, decorated with white frosting, a brown textured highland cow face, and a little pink flower.
notes: Similar detail angle from western/highland cow cookie set.

title: Saguaro Cactus Custom Sugar Cookie
alt_text: A close-up of a custom sugar cookie decorated with vibrant green frosting details to look like a saguaro cactus with small orange flowers and white sprinkles.
notes: Similar detail angle from western/highland cow cookie set.

title: Lavender Onesie Custom Sugar Cookie
alt_text: A close-up of a custom sugar cookie shaped like a baby onesie, decorated with textured lavender frosting, white wings, and a single orange flower.
notes: Similar detail angle from western/highland cow cookie set.

title: Cowboy Boot and Rattle Sugar Cookies
alt_text: A close-up of custom sugar cookies featuring a textured brown cowboy boot decorated with lavender flowers and round baby rattles with green cacti.
notes: Similar detail angle from western/highland cow cookie set.

title: Shark Cupcake Stand
alt_text: A group of five custom shark-themed cupcakes on a round wooden pedestal stand, featuring blue and white swirled wave frosting, grey shark fin toppers, and ocean-colored wave wrappers.
notes: Group of 5 cupcakes on wooden stand. Will be converted from PNG to JPG during import.

title: Shark Cupcake Box
alt_text: A horizontal bakery box filled with twelve custom shark cupcakes featuring white and blue swirled wave frosting, grey shark fin toppers, and ocean-colored wave wrappers.
notes: Box view of 12 cupcakes. Will be converted from PNG to JPG during import.

title: Strawberry Baby Shower Sugar Cookies
alt_text: A set of premium custom sugar cookies arranged in a white bakery box, featuring iced red strawberries, pink baby onesies with white wings, and white daisies with pink swirls.
notes: Strawberry onesie/daisy custom cookies. Will be converted from HEIC to JPG during import.

title: Strawberry Baby Shower Cookie and Macaron Box
alt_text: A top-down view of a bakery box filled with pink and red macarons mixed with custom strawberry sugar cookies, daisy cookies, and pink baby onesie cookies.
notes: Mixed box with strawberry cookies and pink/red macarons. Will be converted from HEIC to JPG during import.

title: Shark Cupcake
alt_text: A highly professional, elegant vertical shot of a single shark-themed cupcake displayed on a mini glass pedestal stand on a white marble countertop, styled with small seashells and lavender flowers.
notes: Highly premium single cupcake editorial. MUST feature.

title: Funny Chocolate Birthday Cake
alt_text: Chocolate birthday cake with playful frosting decorations, candy eyes, and piped chocolate details on a wooden cake stand.
notes: Playful humor-themed custom birthday cake.

title: Puppy First Birthday Sugar Cookies
alt_text: Blue and white puppy first birthday sugar cookies with dog house, party hat, bone, number one, and dog portrait designs.
notes: Puppy themed birthday set. Overview angle.

title: Blue Puppy Birthday Sugar Cookies
alt_text: Blue and white puppy first birthday sugar cookies featuring a dalmatian design, dog house, and bones.
notes: Dalmatian/dachshund cookie drawings angle from puppy birthday set.

title: Puppy Party Sugar Cookies
alt_text: Blue and white puppy first birthday sugar cookies featuring a border collie design, dog house, and bone cookies.
notes: Collie/tan-brown dog drawings angle from puppy birthday set.

title: Vintage Pink Lambeth Heart Cake
alt_text: An elegant double-layer pink heart-shaped vintage Lambeth cake on a glass cake stand, piped with ornate pink borders, decorated with silver beads and dragées, with '22' piped in silver on top.
notes: Heart-shaped vintage Lambeth cake for a 22nd birthday.

title: Classic German Chocolate Cake
alt_text: A premium German chocolate cake on a glass stand styled on a marble countertop with pecans and forks. Features smooth chocolate frosting, rich chocolate drip, toasted coconut and chopped pecan border, and rosettes with pecan halves.
notes: High-end editorial chocolate pecan cake.

title: Classic Cream Cheese Carrot Cake
alt_text: A round carrot cake on a glass pedestal stand, featuring smooth cream cheese frosting, a bottom border of cake crumbs, whipped rosettes topped with little piped carrots, and a center of spiced crumbs.
notes: Clean, elegant carrot cake.

title: Vintage Off-White Lambeth Cake
alt_text: An ornate off-white vintage Lambeth cake on a glass stand, featuring smooth buttercream base, elaborate shell borders, swags, and a piped heart on the side.
notes: Off-white/cream vintage Lambeth heart cake.

title: Pixel Blocks Video Game Birthday Cake
alt_text: Green and brown pixel block style birthday cake with a large number six topper and video game inspired decorations.
notes: Minecraft themed birthday cake. Avoids brand name 'Minecraft' and customer name 'Michael' in public metadata.

title: Whimsical Pastel Birthday Cake
alt_text: A fun and colorful pastel peach birthday cake on a purple glass stand, decorated with rainbow sprinkles on the borders and an assortment of tall gold, twisted colorful, and star-shaped candles with balloons in the background.
notes: Festive peach/pink sprinkle birthday cake.
